channel.title: Seattle Center Events
channel.description: Upcoming events for Seattle Center Events

item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

Event details

item.title: Kraken Pregame in the Armory 25/26
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 5 PM

Location: Armory

Pregame at the Armory, presented by WaFd Bank, is your go-to spot for game day vibes before every Kraken weekend home game at Climate Pledge Arena. Two hours before puck drop, the Armory comes alive with Kraken energy.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Kraken vs Ottawa Senators
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena

The Seattle Kraken host the Ottawa Senators at Climate Pledge Arena.

Event details

item.title: Killers of Kill Tony
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 7 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Regulars and fan favorites from “Kill Tony”, the #1 live podcast in the world, bring their standup show on the road with “Killers of Kill Tony".

Event details

item.title: Killers of Kill Tony
item.description:
Saturday, March 7, 2026 at 9:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Regulars and fan favorites from “Kill Tony”, the #1 live podcast in the world, bring their standup show on the road with “Killers of Kill Tony".

Event details

item.title: Northwest Record Show
item.description:
Sunday, March 8, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Armory

At the Northwest Record Show, you will find tons of vinyl records, CDs, and other music-related collectibles for sale from dealers & stores from all over the PNW.

item.title: Firebird
item.description:
Friday, March 13, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Firebird is back after a 20-year hiatus! Ming Cho Lee’s breathtaking sets, the epic Stravinsky score, and choreography from PNB Founding Artistic Director Kent Stowell work in harmony in this theatrical one-act ballet.

Event details

item.title: Seattle Center Sculpture Walk 2026
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 AM

Location: Seattle Center

Experience temporary art installations on our grounds throughout the year.

Event details

item.title: The Gothic Market
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Cornish Playhouse

This folklore-themed market brings together various aspects of Halloween, horror, witches, vampires, classic monsters, tall tales, campfire stories, couture, the supernatural, strange things, & dark fairytale works.

Event details

item.title: Irish Festival Seattle
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 12 PM

Location: Armory

Seattle Center Festál presents the Irish Festival Seattle in partnership with Irish Heritage Club (IHC). The festival is held in March, on or near St. Patrick’s Day, celebrating Irish heritage, culture, and arts with two-days of traditional music, step-dancing, lectures, genealogy workshops, Irish films, exhibits, displays, and more.

Event details

item.title: Firebird
item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 2 PM

Location: Marion Oliver McCaw Hall

Firebird is back after a 20-year hiatus! Ming Cho Lee’s breathtaking sets, the epic Stravinsky score, and choreography from PNB Founding Artistic Director Kent Stowell work in harmony in this theatrical one-act ballet.

Event details

item.description:
Saturday, March 14, 2026 at 8 PM

Location: Climate Pledge Arena

item.title: St. Pat's Day Dash
item.description:
Sunday, March 15, 2026 at 8:30 AM

Location: Fisher Pavilion

Join us for this Seattle tradition, 42 years running! The St. Patrick’s Day Dash, will once again call Seattle Center home.

Event details

item.title: Mary Jane: Preview Performance
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 7:30 PM

Location: Seattle Repertory Theatre

Poignantly humorous and deeply cathartic, this semi-autobiographical drama by Tony-nominated playwright Amy Herzog is a love letter to caregivers and support systems of all kinds.

Event details

item.title: Seattle's French Fest: A Celebration of French-Speaking Cultures
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 11 AM

Location: Armory

Seattle Center Festál presents Seattle’s French Fest: A Celebration of French Speaking Cultures in partnership with France Education Northwest (FEN). The festival celebrates the diversity of traditions, ideas, dialects, and more that make up French-speaking cultures around the world. While France is often the most well-known French-speaking country for people in the U.S., there are many other countries and places all around the world where French is spoken.

Event details

item.title: Carry5 Walk For Water
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Fisher Pavilion

Walk in solidarity. Experience what collecting water daily really takes.

Event details

item.title: Robin Hood
item.description:
Thursday, March 26, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Seattle Children's Theatre

A wannabe king, lawless law enforcement, and the rich hoarding all the wealth—it’s dark times in Nottingham. But out of the mists of nearby Sherwood Forest comes the hero we’ve been waiting for.

Event details
